title: man-pages bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[6.06-8]
- Remove man-pages-additional-20140218.tar.xz from sources. (RHEL-101696)

[6.06-7]
- Break up man-pages-additional-20140218.tar.xz (RHEL-101696)
- Add rtas.2, swapcontext.2 and cons.saver.8 man pages as a patch.

[6.06-6]
- sched(7): Mention autogroup disabled behavior.
full_text:
[6.06-8]
- Remove man-pages-additional-20140218.tar.xz from sources. (RHEL-101696)

[6.06-7]
- Break up man-pages-additional-20140218.tar.xz (RHEL-101696)
- Add rtas.2, swapcontext.2 and cons.saver.8 man pages as a patch.

[6.06-6]
- sched(7): Mention autogroup disabled behavior.

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-16450.html
